title: 3D Compatible
description: A texturepack which adds 3D models for blocks and items but is compatible with other Texturepacks
body:
### 🧱 Immersive 3D Models for Everyday Blocks
Immerse yourself in a richer, more tactile Minecraft experience with 3D Compatible,
a meticulously crafted texture pack that breathes life into your world
by adding beautifully modeled 3D versions of various in-game blocks—
including ladders, rails, trapdoors, and more—
carefully designed to blend seamlessly into the classic Minecraft look
while elevating the sense of depth and structure in your builds.![3D Rails](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/08ea7e30d95267eb6871982fef29137dd00b2522_0.webp)

### ✨ Beautiful Items with Dimensional Detail
Beyond blocks, this pack also enhances your items,
transforming ordinary objects like lanterns and torches
into detailed 3D models that pop off the screen,
adding that extra touch of realism and craftsmanship
whether they’re placed in the world or held in your hand.

### 🔄 Stackable & Compatible with Other Packs
Built with flexibility in mind, 3D Compatible is fully designed
to work alongside other texture packs,
so you can place it at the top of your resource pack stack
to enjoy all its enhancements without overriding your existing textures or style.

Whether you’re using a medieval pack, a sci-fi theme,
or sticking with vanilla, this pack integrates smoothly
to enrich your visuals without disrupting your aesthetic vision.

### 🌌 Enhance Your World Without Changing Its Soul
Whether you're constructing complex redstone contraptions,
decorating a cozy mountain village, or simply exploring your survival world,
3D Compatible subtly transforms the atmosphere around you—
adding a layer of depth and realism that keeps the heart of Minecraft intact
while making every ladder climb, rail ride, or lantern-lit evening
feel just a little more magical.
